versions.version_description: Mine is at least 99% correct, the others have been rated 5 stars and it's not accurate in the choruses especially.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
NSync
Bye Bye Bye

Chorded by KayTee83


[Intro] 

 [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]F#[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#m[/ch]
Bye Bye Bye[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I'm doing this tonight[/tab]

You're probably gonna start a fight
[tab]  [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
I know this can't be right[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]
Hey baby come on[/tab]

I loved you endlessly

But you weren't there for me
[tab]   [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
So now it's time to leave and make it alone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F#[/ch]
I know that I can't take no more[/tab]

It ain't no lie
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#[/ch]
I wanna see you out that door[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Bye, bye, bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]
Bye, bye bye[/tab]



[Verse]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Just hit me the truth[/tab]

Girl you're more than welcome to
[tab]   [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]
So give me one good reason, baby come on[/tab]

I lived for you and me

And now I've really come to see
[tab]     [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
That life would be much better[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Once you're gone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F#[/ch]
I know that I can't take no more[/tab]

It ain't no lie
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#[/ch]
I wanna see you out that door[/tab]

Baby, bye, bye, bye

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Bye, bye, bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]
Bye, bye bye[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I'm giving up, I know for sure[/tab]

I don't want to be the reason for your love no more

I'm checking out, I'm signing off

I don't want to be the loser and I've had enough



[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]
I don't wanna be your fool[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
In this game for two[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]
So I'm leaving you be - hind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#[/ch]
I don't wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
But I've had enough[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]
And it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
Bye, bye[/tab]


[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Bye, bye, bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]
Bye, bye bye[/tab]
